SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: Planning and construction of the Ina A. Colen Academy, A Charter school located in Marion County, Florida.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: Operation and management of the Ina A Colen Academy providing education services to students in Kindergarten- 8th Grade in the Ocala, FL area

CompensationExplanationGrp.ShortExplanationTxt: The Colen Family Charitable Trust is party to a shared expense agreement. The officer compensation shown in part VII reflects the costs allocable to The Colen Family Charitable Trust.

EmployeeCompExplanationGrp.ExplanationTxt: The Colen Family Charitable Trust is party to a shared expense agreement. The controller compensation shown in part VII reflects the costs allocable to The Colen Family Charitable Trust.

InvestmentsOtherGrp.CategoryOrItemTxt: On Top of the World Foundation Holdings
On Top of the World Holdings, LLC

OtherDecreasesDetail.Desc: Book-Tax Difference on Sale of Contributed Stock
